name: com.kobapps.persistencekit
description: Persistent save system for Unity with source-generated boilerplate. Mark fields with [Persist] / [Encrypted] and route each one independently to JSON / Binary / PlayerPrefs / Remote targets. Per-field AES-256 encryption, multi-slot states, autosave loop with pause/resume/stop, full editor inspector (Inspector / Storage / Snapshots / Activity tabs), JSON export-import, undo, whole-world snapshots, project-scoped settings. Standalone-friendly; optional DI adapters for VContainer and Zenject.

samples.description: Four state types (PlayerProfile / InventoryState / SettingsState / CloudState) routed across every target, encryption, multi-slot, and ~16 mutation buttons in a runtime scene. Includes a Tools menu item that builds the scene programmatically.
